note: Stories for the Ralph loop. Priorities 1-5 (UX depth) are done. 6-10 are the 'top-class native mobile app' UI/UX initiative. One story per loop; mark passes:true when validated (./check.sh + preview).

stories.title: Tap a step to replay just that step
Native app shell: screens + transitions + bottom thumb dock
stories.detail: Restructure from a scrolling web page into app SCREENS (home + result) with smooth push/fade transitions, fixed app bars, safe-area insets, and a bottom thumb-reachable dock for the primary actions. Feels like navigating a native app, not scrolling a page.
stories.acceptance: 100dvh app container; #homeScreen/#resultScreen swap via showScreen() with a transition; app bars; dock honors env(safe-area-inset-bottom); all existing ids + the /ask flow preserved; check.sh green; preview confirms home->result->back.

stories.title: Immersive listening overlay with live waveform
stories.detail: Full-screen 'Listening…' overlay (like Siri/Assistant) when the mic is active: animated waveform bars + live partial transcript + a cancel control. Uses SpeechRecognition interim results.
stories.acceptance: #listen overlay shows on mic start with an animated waveform and #partial interim text; cancel + auto-hide on result/end/error; reduced-motion stills the waveform; check.sh green; preview confirms.

stories.title: Crisp inline SVG icon set (replace emoji)
stories.detail: Replace emoji (mic/phone/speaker/stop/restart/back/close/text-size) with a consistent inline-SVG stroke icon set for a premium native look that renders identically across devices.
stories.acceptance: no emoji used for controls; SVG icons inherit currentColor + size; icon-only buttons keep aria-label; check.sh green; preview confirms.

stories.title: Spring motion, press states, and haptics
stories.detail: Spring/cubic-bezier easings on transitions, scale press-states on every tappable, navigator.vibrate haptics on mic-start / verified / step-tap / error, and a loading shimmer. All gated by prefers-reduced-motion.
stories.acceptance: press states on buttons/cards; buzz() via navigator.vibrate at key moments (guarded); reduced-motion disables animations + transforms; check.sh green; preview confirms.

stories.title: Installable PWA with offline app shell
stories.detail: Make it a real installable app: web manifest (standalone, theme color, icon), Apple meta tags, and a service worker that caches the app shell so it opens offline (the /ask network-error path already falls back to 'call 911'). Served by both diffusion_server and mock_ui.
stories.acceptance: ui_page exports MANIFEST/ICON_SVG/SW_JS; both servers serve /manifest.webmanifest, /icon.svg, /sw.js; <head> has manifest+apple meta; SW registers and caches '/'; check.sh green; curl of the new routes returns 200.
